summary: Generated and integrated a Path Handoff beacon texture for the Route Handoff card, with an animated contained shimmer layer and Visual Asset Vault record.

queries: game UI background texture command center dashboard design 2026
dashboard visual hierarchy background images cards readability UI design best practices
video game UI card background texture readability overlay best practices
pattern_notes: Game UI references use strong cinematic textures, but interaction targets and hierarchy must remain clear.
Visual hierarchy guidance points to contrast, spacing, and restraint so decorative layers support rather than compete with the primary action.
Card backgrounds need darkened overlays and contained animation so the card reads as premium without causing layout or readability problems.

image_generation.prompt: Wide cinematic sci-fi command handoff beacon texture for a game-like operations dashboard, no text; dark glass command surface with luminous route lines, signal arcs, small node constellations, subtle holographic circuitry; abstract route-to-bot transfer signal, premium tactical UI feel; teal, amber, and soft green glow on near-black glass; no words, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, characters, or UI text.

ui_contract: Install the generated bitmap under web/assets/system as a project-bound asset.
Expose the beacon through --path-handoff-beacon on the Path Map Route Handoff card.
Use a dark overlay and contained background-position shimmer so the card remains readable and overflow-free.
Register the image in the Visual Asset Vault system records.
Document the asset in web/README.md for standalone repo users.

red_route.evidence: Before implementation the Path Map handoff card had no beacon custom property, no beacon DOM/image reference, and no project asset reference.

green_route.evidence: The Route Handoff card computed a background image containing path-handoff-beacon-20260618.png, fetched the asset with HTTP 200, and reported no bad rectangles or horizontal overflow.

responsive.evidence: All tested viewports loaded the beacon asset with HTTP 200, kept the shimmer animation active, and reported no bad rectangles, no console errors, no failed requests, and no horizontal overflow.

asset_vault.evidence: The DOM included the path-handoff-beacon asset and Asset Vault text for Path Handoff beacon.
